text.tspan: Aid received per capita vs. GDP per capita, 2019
Total aid received directly per capita versus gross domestic product (GDP) per capita. Total aid received directly is
the sum of country programmable aid (CPA), humanitarian and food aid, measured in constant 2016 USD per
person. GDP per capita is measured in constant international-$. Bubble size represents the estimated number of
people below the international poverty line of $1.90 per person per day.
Source: OECD and UN (2018), Data compiled from multiple sources by World Bank, Crespo-Cuaresma et al. (2018)
